core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Cyberpunk meets Swiss Grid.
Emotion First: The UI must feel 'Fast' and 'Illegal' (in a cool way).
Content is King: Every pixel sells the 'Instant Fame' dream.
Negative Space: Dark space is luxury. Don't fill every corner.
Contrast: Neon on Black. No muddy grays.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00D4FF] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#33DDFF] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,212,255,0.6)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#8B5CF6] text-[#8B5CF6] hover:bg-[#8B5CF6] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg]

cards.marketing: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-white/5 to-white/0 border border-white/10 p-8 hover:border-[#00D4FF]/50 transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-black/20 border border-white/10 focus:border-[#00D4FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00D4FF] rounded-lg text-white placeholder:text-gray-600

motion.glitch_text: Use CSS clip-path animations on hover for headings.

3d_elements.config: Network graph: linked nodes, low opacity, moving slowly.

setup: Install dependencies: `npm install framer-motion lucide-react react-tsparticles tsparticles-slim clsx tailwind-merge`.
Update `tailwind.config.js` to include the new colors (deep-navy, electric-blue, neon-green) and font families (Exo 2, DM Sans).
implementation_order: 1. Setup Base Layout (Navbar, Footer, Background Particles).
2. Build Homepage (Hero with Glitch effect, Services Grid, Trust Proof).
3. Build Dashboard Layout (Sidebar, Topbar, Stats Cards).
4. Implement New Order Page (Forms with real-time calc).
critical_rules: DO NOT use white backgrounds. The app is strictly DARK MODE.
Use `backdrop-blur` heavily but ensure text contrast is high (4.5:1).
Buttons should look 'clickable' - add hover glow.
Forms must be clean - no default browser styles.

anti_ai_rules: Avoid 'SaaS Blue' - use Electric Cyan instead.
Spacing: When in doubt, double the padding.
universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure neon colors are only used for accents, not for long-form text.
universal_guidelines.testing: All key flows (Login, Order, Deposit) must have data-testid attributes.
